question: How can I contact the admission office?
answer: Admission contact listed on the official page: Dr. K. Ayyappan, Vice Principal. Contact numbers: +91 93454 66411 and +91 95007 72277. Office phone: (0413) 2615 308, 309. Email: info@rgcetpdy.ac.in.
notes: Answer derived only from the approved admission contact page.

question: Where can I get the fee payment challan?
answer: Use the official fee payment challan download link: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/RGCET_%20Challan_format.pdf
notes: Answer derived only from the approved challan PDF link.

question: What forms can I download from the college website?
answer: Approved downloadable or official form links currently captured in the knowledge base: Fee Payment Challan, No Dues Exam Hall Ticket, Application for Claim of Attendance on Medical Grounds, Application for Bonafide Certificate, DBRAIT Transfer Application, and the Admission Inquiry Form.
notes: Answer derived only from the approved form and PDF links.

question: Tell me about the placement cell.
answer: The Centre for Training, Placement, and Corporate Relations (CTPCR) organizes training programmes, campus placements, career counseling, aptitude and interview preparation, internships, and industry collaboration. Placement contact email: placementcell@rgcetpdy.ac.in.
notes: Answer derived only from the approved placement about and contact pages.

question: What bus routes are available?
answer: RGCET publishes the official bus route chart here: https://www.rgcet.edu.in/Bus%20Routes.jpg . The exact route-stop text still needs manual review from the official image.
notes: Answer derived only from the approved bus route image link.
